response.justification: 15+ years of full-stack professional experience well exceeds the seniority bar, with strong alignment to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and a current role explicitly involving AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development — a direct hit on one of the harder-to-find requirements. A deep, demonstrated testing culture (TDD advocacy, open-source testing tooling, teaching) further strengthens the fit; the main gaps are Nest.js (not mentioned) and Kotlin (absent), both of which are learnable for a developer at this level.
strengths: Current hands-on AI agent and MCP framework work directly matches the AI agent development requirement
Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React production experience with measurable scale (millions of direct-mail items, high-throughput microservices)
Exceptional testing culture: TDD practitioner, educator, and author of open-source D-language testing libraries
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned anywhere on the resume despite being a listed primary stack technology
Kotlin is absent from the skill set; Java exposure is minimal and dated (robotic arms work, 2016–2018)
PostgreSQL not listed; relational database experience appears limited to MySQL/SQL, with no explicit mention of PostgreSQL

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience
Core stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React, cloud, containers)
